title: post api auth login
description: Test user login with valid email and password, expect 200 response with ok true, provider info, and session cookie set.

title: post api auth logout
description: Test user logout with valid session cookie, expect 200 response with ok true and session cookie cleared.

title: get api auth check
description: Test session authentication check with valid session cookie, expect 200 response with authenticated true or false.

title: post api auth delete account
description: Test account deletion with valid session and userId in body, expect 200 response with ok true; test missing userId or invalid session returns 400 or 401.

title: post api threads
description: Test creating a new conversation thread with optional x-user-id header and optional title, expect 200 response with created thread object.

title: get api threads
description: Test listing all threads for authenticated user, expect 200 response with array of threads.

title: get api threads id
description: Test retrieving a single thread and its messages by id for authenticated user, expect 200 with thread and messages; 404 if thread not found.

title: post api threads id messages
description: Test posting a user message to a thread with x-user-id header and content, expect 200 with message and AI reply; test error cases for missing content, missing user id, thread not found, and rate limiting.

title: post api automations process
description: Test processing automations with optional automationId and context, expect 200 with results array; test rate limit exceeded returns 429.

title: get api model status
description: Test retrieving current AI model provider status, expect 200 with models object and active provider string.
